headline: ₹500-2,000 Cr at risk over project lifecycle if regulatory or ESG headwinds materialize — Adani Power secures LoI for 2,400 MW thermal plant in Bihar, raising fossil fuel exposure amid ESG scrutiny
what_matters: BRSR [MANDATORY], TCFD, CDP, GRI triggered; risk of SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions.
Possible P/E compression (5-10%) if ESG ratings decline; margin pressure from higher compliance costs.
Potential 20-40bps increase in cost of capital due to BRSR/TCFD scrutiny; risk of FII outflow.
